description_long: This house features a simple rectangular structure with a prominent, steeply pitched gable roof in a light gray color. The front facade includes a central wooden door flanked by two rectangular windows with brown frames, providing a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The side elevations each have a single window, while the rear facade displays a pair of closely set windows. The roof overhangs the walls slightly, offering some protection from the elements. The exterior walls are smooth and painted in a light neutral tone, and the overall design is minimalistic with no visible decorative elements or porches. The house appears to be a single-story dwelling, typical of suburban or rural neighborhoods.
description: A single-story house with a steep gable roof, central wooden door, and symmetrically arranged windows in a minimalistic style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central wooden door and two symmetrically placed windows.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a single window and the steep pitch of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with two closely set windows and no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two windows and the gable roof's profile.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with no porch or steps, flanked by windows and sheltered by a roof overhang.
